prompt: Create a high-fashion editorial portrait of a young East Asian woman with glossy jet-black hair with a single thin red streak, blunt straight bangs, long hair, pale skin, dramatic brown eyes, glossy dark red lips, and a small beauty mark under one eye. She is lying sideways on a minimalist studio set, propping her head with one hand and gazing directly into the camera with a calm, intense, slightly melancholic expression. Style her in an avant-garde black and vivid crimson red sculptural dress: a black sleeveless base with voluminous black fabric around the lower body and one large folded, petal-like crimson satin sleeve or shoulder structure wrapping across the foreground. Add a sleek black cuff bracelet on her wrist. The background is a bold abstract composition with exactly three main geometric areas: a large soft gray-white circular spotlight shape behind her head, a deep black negative-space field, and a sharp diagonal saturated red panel on the right. Use hard directional studio lighting from the upper left, creating strong shadows, high contrast, glossy highlights on hair and lips, and a cinematic chiaroscuro mood. Frame vertically in a close fashion-magazine crop, with her face in the left-center, the red sculptural fabric dominating the lower center, and the diagonal red background creating tension on the right. Photorealistic, ultra-detailed skin texture, luxury editorial styling, dramatic color blocking, no text, no watermark.
